name: Third-Party Work Injuries Boise ID

mainEntity.name: What if I get injured by a third party at work in Boise Idaho?
mainEntity.text: What if I get injured by a third party at work in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: File workers comp through your employer while pursuing a separate personal injury claim against the at-fault party. Idaho law allows both; notify employer immediately and consult an attorney to coordinate claims without affecting comp benefits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise work injuries from third parties (e.g., negligent drivers) qualify for comp plus potential larger settlements. Employers/insurers may pressure to waive third-party rights—don't sign anything without review. Local laws differ from Utah; secure counsel experienced in ID dual claims to maximize recovery.
